SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AccessPoint
Represents a physical Wi-Fi Access Point used for indoor positioning.
CsvDataProcessor
Processes CSV data containing RSSI measurements to calibrate Access Points.
CsvExporter
A background thread designed to export collected Wi-Fi measurements to a CSV file.
CsvReader
A background thread designed to read CSV files from the application's assets folder asynchronously.
DemoFragment
Represents the main user interface for the indoor Wi-Fi positioning demonstration.
GraphManager
Manages the 2D graphical representation of the indoor positioning system.
HardwareHandler
Utility class for verifying and managing the state of required hardware sensors.
ICsvExportCompleted
A callback interface to handle the completion of a CSV export operation.
ICsvReadCompleted
A callback interface to handle the completion of a CSV reading operation.
IOnProcessingCompleted
Callback interface used to notify when the RSSI data processing and Access Point calibration are completed.
IWiFiScanCompleted
Callback interface used to deliver the results of a Wi-Fi scan operation.
MainActivity
The main entry point of the application.
TrainingFragment
Manages the training phase of the indoor positioning system.
TrilaterationEngine
Provides utility methods to calculate the device's physical position using trilateration.
WiFiReceiver
Handles the reception of Wi-Fi scan results from the Android system.
